text: When buying electronics or cars, what do you value more?

options.text: Century-old brand heritage and reputation, stability first.
Disruptive innovation and avant-garde design from new brands, love trying new things.

text: At a party where nobody knows each other, you would:

options.text: Take the initiative, find the conversation center and control the rhythm.
Find a corner to observe, wait for others to approach, or only join topics others start.

text: In a startup team, what do you think matters most?

options.text: A Jobs-like leader with absolute authority and godlike ability.
A perfect SOP that keeps things running even if people change.

text: In a relationship, which state do you find more ideal?

options.text: Conditions match, mutual benefit, living a stable practical life together.
Soul connection, even with heavy real-world resistance, pursue ultimate romance and passion.

text: When cooking a big meal, your habit is:

options.text: Plan the menu in advance, prepare all ingredients, cook step by step.
Open the fridge to see what's left, taste while cooking, create freely.

text: When you made a big mistake at work and your boss is furious:

options.text: Very panicked inside, might be down for several days.
Immediately calm down, the harder the scolding, the more I want to prove myself with a perfect fix.

text: Handling a boundary dispute with a neighbor, you would:

options.text: Take a tough stance, negotiate loudly, use aura and hard means to push them back.
Reason with them, or use property management/legal channels to resolve tactfully.

text: At a regular restaurant, finding your favorite dish is off the menu:

options.text: Quickly browse the menu, excitedly try something new.
Feel very disappointed, even consider switching restaurants.

text: Which type of literature or film script do you prefer?

options.text: Epic tales maintaining orthodoxy and restoring family glory.
Underdog stories rising up and overthrowing the old world order.

text: For your financial plan for the second half of the year, your strategy is:

options.text: Actively seek high-yield projects, even with risks, attack to expand assets.
Cash is king, keep it in the bank or buy stable fixed income, defend your base.

text: Playing escape rooms or murder mystery games, you usually:

options.text: Like taking the core C-position role, leading everyone to find the truth, enjoying the spotlight.
Quietly search for clues, organize your part and hand it to the team, be a good support.

text: A friend asks to borrow money for an investment you think is very unreliable:

options.text: Even brothers keep clear accounts, refuse decisively to avoid future disputes.
Even if unreliable, for friendship and feelings, still lend it.

text: Which work rhythm do you prefer?

options.text: Nine to five daily, clear tasks, steady progress with no surprises.
Usually chill, then an urgent big project comes, grind hard for a few days to finish it.

text: In competitive games, you get terrible teammates causing a big deficit:

options.text: Feel hopeless, initiate surrender vote, start next game quickly.
Mute teammates, grit teeth to find comeback points, drag to the last moment even if losing.

text: If you must learn a self-defense art, you choose:

options.text: Muay Thai or boxing, fist to flesh, knock down opponents with absolute power and speed.
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu or Tai Chi, using softness to overcome hardness, joint techniques to subdue.

text: Your dressing style is usually:

options.text: Change by occasion, seamlessly switch between business, casual, and street.
Have a fixed aesthetic system (like minimalism/workwear), rarely change.

text: If your city had a historic team being relegated, and a newly founded wealthy team winning like crazy:

options.text: Still support the historic home team, heritage cannot be replaced by money.
Switch attention to the winning new rich, competitive sports is about admiring the strong.

text: When you're unhappy with your partner's behavior:

options.text: Point it out immediately, even if it causes an argument, get it out right away.
Endure for a while, wait until they're in a good mood to bring it up gently.

text: Your view on historical progress:

options.text: History is driven by the decisions of a few geniuses and heroes.
History is the systemic inevitability built by countless ordinary people.

text: A high-paying job with disgusting content, vs a normal-paying job you deeply love:

options.text: Choose high pay, money is the hard truth, passion can't feed you.
Choose passion, if work deprives my spiritual joy, no amount of money is worth it.

text: Grocery shopping, you usually:

options.text: Make a list, go straight to target areas, buy and leave.
Push the cart wandering around, grab what looks good, always have surprise at checkout.

text: Facing life's low points (breakup, unemployment), your recovery speed:

options.text: Need a long time to heal, hard to get over it easily.
Like a spring, the deeper the fall the faster the bounce, quickly back on track.

text: Moving, encountering an extremely heavy wardrobe, you would:

options.text: Take a deep breath, use all muscle strength to lift it over.
Find pulleys, planks or crowbars, use physics leverage to move it easily.

text: If industry rules changed dramatically, your reaction is:

options.text: Excited! Immediately study new rules, find new opportunities and dividends.
Resistant. Stick to your original field, believe craftsman spirit can withstand change.

text: Which type of architecture do you appreciate more?

options.text: Classical cathedrals or palaces carrying centuries of history.
Modern deconstructivist buildings with disruptive, physics-defying designs.

text: Discussing a controversial social topic, you usually:

options.text: First to deliver your long speech, setting the discussion tone.
Listen to all sides first, then throw in your summarized insight at the end.

text: Watching hero movies, what moves you more:

options.text: The protagonist alone turning the tide, saving the world.
Countless unknown supporting characters sacrificing themselves to buy time for the hero.
When buying furniture, you value most:
Durable, stain-resistant, easy to maintain, practicality above all.
Looks, design sense, atmosphere, even if hard to maintain I'll accept it.
Organizing a hundred-person conference, your state is:
Schedule precise to the minute, all contingency plans written in the manual to feel secure.
Set a big framework only, believe in handling things as they come.
The night before an exam, finding most content unreviewed, you would:
Despair, give up treatment, prepare for retake.
Chug coffee, enter极限 state, never close eyes until entering the exam room.
Dealing with an uncommunicative customer service, your strategy:
Directly raise volume, apply emotional pressure, demand to speak to the manager.
Quickly record/screenshot, fluently cite consumer protection law for a降维打击.
In different social circles (elders, colleagues, best friends):
Like a chameleon, showing completely different personality traits.
Always the same, never change names or seats, insist on being yourself.
If you could time travel, you prefer:
Back to a prosperous ancient golden age, experiencing orthodox noble life.
To the Age of Discovery or chaotic times, building an empire from scratch.
In a company meeting, everyone is silent, you would:
Can't stand the awkwardness, actively throw out an idea to break the ice.
As long as my name isn't called, quietly be a small透明.
You believe your achievements today mainly come from:
My personal talent, effort and decisive moments.
The platform I'm on, era dividends and team support.
For a friend's birthday gift, you tend to:
Send a big red envelope or gift card, most practical.
Handmake something or write a long letter, affection is priceless.
Watching a sports match, you enjoy more:
Tactical chess-like gameplay, controlling the ball to wear down opponents.
Wide open play, lightning strikes piercing defenses in a few passes.
Assigned to the weakest department in the company:
Think it's a mess, just want to find a way to transfer out quickly.
Think it's a great opportunity to prove yourself,逆风局 is exciting.
Cleaning your room, encountering stubborn stains:
Grab brush and steel wool, scrub hard.
Google chemical reactions, buy the right cleaner to dissolve easily.
If your direct boss was replaced by someone with a completely different style:
Quickly figure out their temperament, change your reporting style to accommodate.
Continue working the way you think is correct, unwilling to compromise.
You prefer spending money on:
A保值 classic Rolex watch.
Supporting an unknown but talented independent designer brand.
Facing your secret crush, you would:
Confess directly or create opportunities for crazy hints, offense is the best defense.
Silently observe, keep improving yourself, waiting for them to notice you first.
In MMORPG raids, your class preference:
High-burst assassin or main DPS mage, the team's damage core.
Buffing healer or main tank pulling aggro, silently maintaining team health.
For an elective course, two ways to get an A, you choose:
Memorize the question bank for an A, though learning nothing but protecting GPA.
Write a deep paper for an A, worth the trouble to explore truth.
Your computer desktop/phone app arrangement:
Strictly categorized folders, every icon in its proper place.
Chaotic mess covering the screen, I can always find what I need instantly.
In a long run, hitting the extreme fatigue 'wall':
Immediately feel崩溃, likely stop and switch to walking.
Grit teeth and keep running, the more pain the more alive I feel.
The most effective way to resolve workplace conflicts:
Show unquestionable hard strength and手腕, beat them into submission.
Use EQ, connections and interest exchange, elegantly resolve矛盾.
When a book/movie completely doesn't meet expectations:
果断 abandon, immediately find something else, never waste time.
OCD kicks in, even if terrible must grit teeth and finish it.
Which school would you prefer for your child?
A century-old prestigious school with strict rules and升学 history.
An innovative experimental school with no fixed textbooks encouraging disruptive thinking.
Driving, someone cuts in front of you forcefully:
Accelerate to block them, never yield, defend your road rights.
Brake and let them in, safety first, no trouble.
Which type of startup story do you prefer?
One person with a逆天 invention, single-handedly changing the world.
Several partners with complementary strengths, building an empire together.
To land a big client order:
Even if needing to疯狂 entertain and迎合 their low tastes, I can endure.
If it sacrifices dignity and values, this money I won't earn.
Playing strategy games (like Civilization, Red Alert), you prefer:
Build high walls, hoard resources, make your territory impregnable.
No defenses,疯狂 spam units and charge directly, one-wave带走对面.
In project推进, encountering huge resistance, colleagues all advise giving up:
Listen to advice and eat well, timely止损 is wise.
The whole world opposes? Then I must make it happen!
Breaking through defense in basketball, your signature move:
Like a tank对抗挤开 defender, forceful layup.
Silky crossovers and Euro steps, deceiving opponents without touching leaves.
Facing sudden changes in meeting time or location:
Don't care at all, grab notebook and immediately enter new state.
Very annoyed inside, disrupting my rhythm is unbearable.
Which statement do you agree with more?
Classics are classics because they have stood the test of time.
Nothing is sacred and inviolable, all conventions are made to be broken.
In a competitive match where you're weaker than the opponent:
Attack from the start,乱拳打死老师傅, fighting for a chance.
Fully收缩 defense,死死拖住对方, wait for their mistake to counter.
What's most important in a symphony orchestra?
A talented chief violinist who can infect everyone with passion.
All musicians' highly默契 cooperation, without any突兀 noise.
Blind date with someone you feel nothing for, but extremely wealthy divorced person:
Would seriously consider, after all marriage is essentially resource combination.
Absolutely not, without heartbeat feeling, more money is still a cage.
Writing articles or making PPTs, you:
Must have clear directory structure and logic tree, carefully weigh every word.
Write wherever thoughts go, free rein, key points highlighted are enough.
Looking back at your past, when did most of your growth happen?
In顺境, growing fastest when encouraged and surrounded by love.
In逆境, pain that couldn't kill me made me stronger.
Which fitness/sport style do you prefer?
Heavy squats/deadlifts, pursuing muscle tearing and pump.
Pilates/yoga/badminton, pursuing core stability and precise movement control.
Arriving in a foreign land where you don't speak the language at all, you would:
Use sign language, drawings, machine translation to boldly explore immediately, find it interesting.
Extremely insecure,坚决 not leave the guide or translator.
When a century-old restaurant changes taste to cater to young people:
Feel very遗憾, thinking they betrayed tradition and heritage.
Think it's normal, don't evolve and die, as long as it tastes good.
At the negotiation table, your style is:
Throw out the bottom line aggressively from the start, cornering the opponent.
Listen to their quote first, crazy tug-of-war, finally wear them down through磨洋工.
When appreciating a famous painting, you focus more on:
The painter's legendary experience, mad talent and highly personal brushwork.
The painting's composition rules, color proportions and systematic school expression.
Your team is down 0-1 in the final, last minute penalty kick, how do you want to take it?
As long as it goes in even if extremely ugly, winning is everything.
Score a shocking Panenka, if winning then win with arrogance and freedom.
Planning a hundred-person party, what worries you most:
Process衔接 errors causing awkwardness or chaos.
Programs too平庸 lacking爆点, everyone finds it boring after watching.
If you were a stock, your chart would be:
Rising in bull markets, first to crash in bear markets, poor抗跌 ability.
Maybe lukewarm in bull markets, but in bear markets where everyone crashes, I can逆势拉升.
Facing the decision to fire an employee, you would:
Business is business, act swiftly and decisively, cut ties quickly.
Carefully斟酌话术, even help them find next opportunities, minimize harm.
Facing an extremely complex new software tool:
Don't read manual, directly start clicking and testing randomly, learn by mistakes.
Take a course or read official docs from start to finish before operating.
What kind of items do you prefer collecting?
Antiques, stamps or limited classic figurines, carrying memories.
Latest tech toys or crypto digital collectibles, representing the future.
In court, if you were a lawyer, you're better at:
Plaintiff's lawyer. Actively attack,步步紧逼, bury opponent with evidence.
Defendant's lawyer.见招拆招, find one logic flaw in their long speech to reverse and counter.
Your computer broke, affecting the whole team's progress, you feel:
Extremely guilty, feeling it's your fault for dragging everyone down.
Very annoyed, blaming the company for not providing a better computer.
To maintain health, you need to quit your favorite snack:
Immediately throw out all stock, even painful can force quit with willpower.
Life is short, if you can't eat your favorite food, what's the point of health?
When chatting, which type of person do you hate more?
Mind jumps extremely fast, always off-topic, making it hard to catch the point.
Like writing八股文, rigid and boring, with no surprise at all.
Playing poker (like Texas Hold'em), you get a terrible hand:
Immediately fold, never waste chips on garbage cards.
Bluff to the end, use psychological warfare to scare away opponents with good hands!
In wilderness survival, which tool do you trust more?
A heavy开山刀. One force overcomes ten techniques,劈开 all obstacles.
A multi-functional Swiss Army knife. Exquisite and versatile, handling various complex scenarios.
Finally the last question! If you could only use one word to describe your football/life philosophy, it would be:
Change brings通,通 brings longevity, always in flow and evolution.
After countless磨难 still坚劲,咬住 one system, regardless of wind from any direction.
